prompt: An overcast daylight shot of a kitchen window from inside — net curtains diffusing flat grey light onto a simple formica countertop. A single mug and a folded newspaper on the counter. Muted grey, beige, and faded blue-green tones. No stylization — completely naturalistic. The beauty is in the quiet ordinariness. Eye-level, static, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
